children.heading: Federal action
children.label: a Federal action
children.text: Except as provided in the Family Smoking Prevention and Tobacco Control Act (and the amendments made by that Act), no statement relating to the use of smokeless tobacco products and health, other than the statements required by , shall be required by any Federal agency to appear on any package or in any advertisement (unless the advertisement is an outdoor billboard advertisement) of a smokeless tobacco product.section 4402 of this title

children.heading: State and local action
children.label: b State and local action
children.text: No statement relating to the use of smokeless tobacco products and health, other than the statements required by , shall be required by any State or local statute or regulation to be included on any package or in any advertisement (unless the advertisement is an outdoor billboard advertisement) of a smokeless tobacco product.section 4402 of this title

children.heading: Effect on liability law
children.label: c Effect on liability law
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall relieve any person from liability at common law or under State statutory law to any other person.
